title: Control Azure spending and manage bills with Microsoft Cost Management + Billing
summary: Learn how to monitor and control your Azure spending and optimize the use of Azure resources.

sections.title: Control Azure spending and manage bills with Microsoft Cost Management + Billing
sections.summary: Learn how to monitor and control your Azure spending and optimize the use of Azure resources.

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Cost Optimization
lessons.content_md:
Apply cost optimization guidance in your architecture to sustain and improve your return on investment (ROI).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-cost-optimization/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Cost Optimization

lessons.title: Introduction to analyzing costs and creating budgets with Microsoft Cost Management
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to use cost analysis to understand how your costs accrue each month.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/analyze-costs-create-budgets-azure-cost-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to analyzing costs and creating budgets with Microsoft Cost Management

lessons.title: Save money with Azure Reserved Instances
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to save money by taking advantage of Azure Reserved Instances.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/save-money-with-azure-reserved-instances/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Save money with Azure Reserved Instances

lessons.title: Optimize Azure costs with data analysis in Power BI
lessons.content_md:
Use Power BI to understand where your money is being spent in Azure so you can help your organization to optimize its costs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/optimize-costs-data-analysis-powerbi/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Optimize Azure costs with data analysis in Power BI

lessons.title: Configure and manage costs as a Microsoft partner by using Microsoft Cost Management
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to reconcile your bill and analyze costs across your customers and resources by using Microsoft Cost Management as a partner.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/manage-costs-partner-cost-management/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and manage costs as a Microsoft partner by using Microsoft Cost Management

lessons.title: Purchase Azure savings plan for compute
lessons.content_md:
Purchase Azure savings plan for compute helps customers minimize their operational costs.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-savings-plan-for-compute/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Purchase Azure savings plan for compute

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Control Azure spending and manage bills with Microsoft Cost Management + Billing
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Control Azure spending and manage bills with Microsoft Cost Management + Billing**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
